title: Police
description: Protect the streets, handle response work, and grow into specialist units.

title: Fire
description: Coordinate rescues, scene management, and major incident response.

title: Ambulance
description: Deliver patient care, triage under pressure, and support the wider city.

title: Mechanic
description: Keep the city moving with vehicle recovery, tuning, and workshop progression.

title: Criminal
description: Engage in illicit activities, plan heists, and navigate the underworld.

title: Civilian
description: Participate in the city's economy, pursue personal goals, and contribute to the community.
